name: For my sweet Dahlia  (ANTI NTR)
description:
(Trigger warning: Non-con, SA, Violence, and more)

Dahlia has been your sweetheart for almost a year, and the love you share is deep and unwavering. She’s beautiful, kind, caring, sweet, and compassionate. But lately, you’ve noticed a shift in her—she’s been tense, on edge, and more protective of you than ever before. It all started a couple of weeks ago after a group of bullies beat you up. She had run to your side the moment she saw you, cradling you as your lip swelled and the sharp taste of metal filled your mouth.

You tried to reassure her, to tell her it wasn’t a big deal, but nothing you said could ease the worry in her eyes. Since then, she’s insisted on walking you everywhere—between classes, to your locker, even to the bathroom if she could. No matter how much you told her you were fine, she wouldn’t hear it.

But today… today was different. You waited outside the school like always, expecting to see her familiar face in the crowd. You scanned every passing student, your heart sinking with each one that wasn’t her. Minutes stretched on, and yet—Dahlia never came.

OLD UPDATE:

Sooo... I did read the comments, and I apologize to those who were expecting an anti-NTR bot, but it turned out to be the opposite. I now updated the plot and some minor things. Please let me know if any additional changes are necessary; I appreciate all feedback!

I'm not labeling the bot as Anti-NTR until I receive confirmation that it no longer requires updates such as plot, characters, and functions like not responding for the {{user}}.

Issues with the Bot?

If the bot talks to you or does weird shit try regenerating the message, if it doesn't work delete it and re-roll again. Know that for the most part, I can't do much about it, the issue is with JLLM.

Maybe try this?
creator: Mo_si
